title: psacalium putlanum
intro: Psacalium putlanum is a type of plant native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as a Mexican dandelion or bitter dandelion. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Psacalium putlanum has been associated with several health benefits, including the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and the relief of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Psacalium putlanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
